title: Numbering the 10 words | 10 word breakdown (LEB)
body:
# 1
Deuteronomy 5:6-21 LEB 6 ‘I am Yahweh your God, who brought you out from the land of Egypt, from the house of slavery. 7 There shall not be for you other gods besides me. 
# 2
8 ‘You shall not make for yourself a divine image of any type of form that is in the heaven above or that is on the earth beneath or that is in the water under the earth. 9 ‘You shall not bow down to them, and you shall not serve them, 
# 3
for I, Yahweh your God, am a jealous God, punishing the guilt of fathers upon their children and upon the third and upon the fourth generation of those hating me, 10 but showing loyal love to thousands of those who love me and of those who keep my commandments.
# 4
11 ‘You shall not take up the name of Yahweh your God for a worthless purpose, for Yahweh will not leave unpunished anyone who uses his name for a worthless purpose. 
# 5
12 ‘Observe the Sabbath day to make it holy, just as Yahweh your God has commanded you. 13 Six days you shall work, and you shall do all of your work, 14 but the seventh day is a Sabbath unto Yahweh your God; you shall not do any work, or your son, or your daughter, or your slave, or your slave woman, or your ox, or your donkey, or any of your domestic animals, or your resident alien who is in your towns, so that your slave and your slave woman may rest as you rest. 
# 6
15 And you shall remember that you were a slave in the land of Egypt, and Yahweh your God brought you out with a strong hand and with an outstretched arm; therefore, Yahweh your God commanded you to keep the Sabbath. 
# 7
16 ‘Honor your father and your mother, as Yahweh your God commanded you, so that it will be good for you in the land that Yahweh your God is giving to you. 
# 8
17 ‘You shall not murder. 18 ‘And you shall not commit adultery. 
# 9
19 ‘And you shall not steal. 20 ‘And you shall not falsely bear evidence against your neighbor.
# 10
 21 ‘And you shall not covet the wife of your neighbor, and you shall not crave the house of your neighbor, his field or his slave or his slave woman or his ox and his donkey or anything that belongs to your neighbor.’

comments.author: joshualinog
comments.body: @TonyLinog this is a cool spot to do a quick review on the numbering

comments.author: joshualinog
comments.body:
## **1**
I am **<u>Yahweh</u>**. I am **<u>your God</u>**. I [alone] am the one who [came down for you and] **<u>brought</u>** you out of the **<u>land of Egypt</u>**, out of the **<u>house of slavery</u>**. There are no other gods for you, do not put **<u>any other Gods</u>** on my **<u>face</u>** [in my presence].
## **6**
You must **<u>remember</u>**, [& memorialize this:]
You **<u>were slaves</u>** [in the house of slavery, down] in the **<u>land</u>** [& kingdom] **<u>of Egypt</u>**. And **<u>Yahweh</u>** **<u>your God</u>** [took you &] **<u>brought you out from</u>** [down] there. He stretches his **<u>arm</u>** [down from heaven], & [took you away from other slavers] with a strong [& overpowering] **<u>hand</u>**. This is why he commands you to do the day of Shabbat.
### **Transcription Notes:**
 * **Structure:** I have formatted these as two distinct paragraphs as requested.
 * **Emphasis:** Words underlined in green on your whiteboard (like *Yahweh*, *your God*, and *house of slavery*) are represented here with underlines.
 * **Additions:** All text within square brackets [ ] reflects your parenthetical translations or contextual notes from the board.

comments.author: joshualinog
comments.body:
![IMG-20260421-WA0012.jpg](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/c6143dcd-edaf-4a11-ba88-70cd41cdc557)


## **Top Section: Lexical Analysis & Deuteronomy 4:16**
**Deuteronomy 5:8-9a / Deuteronomy 5:16 [17, 18, 19, 20]**
 * **A carved model**, **to/for yourself**, **make/craft**, **NO any at all**, **ANY/ALL**
 * **Carved model of embodiments of any/all resemblances of any construct/pattern, male image or female image**
   * *Annotations below:* Duplicate, visible shape, DEPICTION, visual copy, image, visualization.
**Deuteronomy 4:16**
> "You shall not, you not yourself (emphatic), most assuredly will not yourself and you make/craft for yourselves a carved model any kind/form of any resemblance of any construct or pattern male or female."
> 
 * **Note:** Not divine mother/father pairs, patronage.
 * **17-20:** Constructs/patterns of all the beasts, fish, birds—**HEAVENS, EARTH, SEAS** (all the places of the seen realm).
 * **Constructs/patterns** of sun, moon, armies of heavens; allotments of the peoples/nations.
 * **YHWH** took you out of the furnace of iron, EGYPT, to be your inheritance.
 * **-simulacra for sympathetic magic**
## **Middle Section: Visual/Vision & The Three Realms**
**VISUAL/VISION - mirroring, resemblance, image**
 * [Lift your eyes to all that is seen, the three levels, realms, places of earth]
 * [The earth, the three seen and unveiled levels:
   1. **The heavens above**, the veil/barrier above, unblocked, unbarriered.
   2. **The earth under the heavens**, the ground man was brought out of.
   3. **The seas under the earth**, the waters the land was brought out of.
**-LIFT YOUR EYES AND SEE-**
 * Do not look in these places for father and mother images you can see. There did not bring forth your image.
 * Do not bow down before them, and serve them. Do not honor them and seek for them to direct you.
## **Bottom Section: The Commandments (Words 1-3)**
 1. **I am YHWH your God.** I alone brought you out from the land of Egypt, a house of slaves. You have no other gods. Do not put them on my face.
 2. **Do not make for yourself a carved image**, a duplicate of what you see in the heavens above, of what you see in the earth beneath the heavens, of what you see in the waters beneath the earth. Do not stare and search for any father or mother image to copy. Do not bow down to them, serve them, honor them.
 3. **Because I, YHWH, your God have this name: EL QANA**, Duel of husband zeal. I am always working in my bride, Israel. I never stop this work: fathers who hate me, I... *(text ends here)*
